parameters.body:
{
  "user_id": "{{ $json.body.user_id }}",
  "tool": "niche_validator",
  "type": "niche_validation",
  "metadata": {
    "niche_idea": "{{ $json.body.niche_idea }}",
    "geography": "{{ $json.geography }}",
    "viability_score": {{ $json.viability_score }},
    "viability_category": "{{ $json.viability_category }}"
  },
  "payload": {
    "niche_name": "{{ $json.niche_name }}",
    "geography": "{{ $json.geography }}",
    "market_size_estimate": {{ JSON.stringify($json.market_size_estimate) }},
    "competitors": {{ JSON.stringify($json.competitors) }},
    "pain_points": {{ JSON.stringify($json.pain_points) }},
    "monetization_angles": {{ JSON.stringify($json.monetization_angles) }},
    "viability_score": {{ $json.viability_score }},
    "viability_category": "{{ $json.viability_category }}",
    "score_reasoning": "{{ $json.score_reasoning }}",
    "recommended_icp": {{ JSON.stringify($json.recommended_icp) }},
    "recommended_offer_angle": "{{ $json.recommended_offer_angle }}",
    "key_opportunities": {{ JSON.stringify($json.key_opportunities) }},
    "key_risks": {{ JSON.stringify($json.key_risks) }}
  },
  "created_at": "now()"
}

parameters.responseBody:
{
  "success": true,
  "validation": {
    "niche_name": "{{ $json.niche_name }}",
    "geography": "{{ $json.geography }}",
    "market_size_estimate": {{ JSON.stringify($json.market_size_estimate) }},
    "competitors": {{ JSON.stringify($json.competitors) }},
    "pain_points": {{ JSON.stringify($json.pain_points) }},
    "monetization_angles": {{ JSON.stringify($json.monetization_angles) }},
    "viability_score": {{ $json.viability_score }},
    "viability_category": "{{ $json.viability_category }}",
    "score_reasoning": "{{ $json.score_reasoning }}",
    "recommended_icp": {{ JSON.stringify($json.recommended_icp) }},
    "recommended_offer_angle": "{{ $json.recommended_offer_angle }}",
    "key_opportunities": {{ JSON.stringify($json.key_opportunities) }},
    "key_risks": {{ JSON.stringify($json.key_risks) }}
  }
}
